INSERT INTO cards (artist, flavorText, keywords, name, uuid) VALUES ('John Avon', 'In the light of dawn, hope takes flight.', 'Flying', 'Celestial Guardian', 'b1c2d3e4-f5a6-7b8c-9d0e-f1a2b3c4d5e6'), ('Dan Scott', 'The ground trembles beneath its weight.', 'Trample', 'Giants Fury', 'c2d3e4f5-g6h7-8i9j-k0l1-m2n3o4p5q6r7'), ('Chris Rahn', 'It strikes like lightning, leaving only ashes.', 'Haste', 'Blazing Charger', 'd3e4f5g6-h7i8-j9k0-l1m2-n3o4p5q6r7s8'), ('Terese Nielsen', 'Always watching, never resting.', 'Vigilance', 'Sentinel of the Dawn', 'e4f5g6h7-i8j9-k0l1-m2n3-o4p5q6r7s8t9'), ('Rebecca Guay', 'A flash of steel, a whisper of death.', 'First strike', 'Swiftblade', 'f5g6h7i8-j9k0-l1m2-n3o4-p5q6r7s8t9u0'), ('Jason Chan', 'It dances among the clouds, a true master of the skies.', 'Flying', 'Skyward Serpent', 'g6h7i8j9-k0l1-m2n3-o4p5-q6r7s8t9u0v1'), ('Adam Paquette', 'A shield against the darkness.', 'Protection', 'Guardian Spirit', calls, and it answers.', 'Haste', 'Feral Instinct', 'j9k0l1m2-n3o4-p5q6-r7s8-t9u0v1w2x3y4'), ('Brian Despain', 'A fleeting glimpse of the otherworld.', 'Flying', 'Ethereal Wisp', INSERT INTO posts (Id, CreaionDate, Title, Body) VALUES (115208, '2011-01-15 14:22:30.0', 'Understanding Bayesian Inference', '

What are the key concepts behind Bayesian inference and how does it differ from frequentist approaches?

'), (115209, '2011-02-20 09:45:12.0', 'The Central Limit Theorem Explained', '

'), (115210, '2011-03-05 11:30:45.0', 'Data Visualization Techniques', '

'), (115211, '2011-04-10 16:15:00.0', 'Machine Learning vs Traditional Statistics', '

How does machine learning differ from traditional statistical methods in terms of approach and application?

'), (115212, '2011-05-25 08:00:00.0', 'Understanding P-Values', '

'), (115213, '2011-06-30 12:00:00.0', 'Exploring Time Series Analysis', '

'), (115214, '2011-07-15 10:30:00.0', 'The Importance of Data Cleaning', '

'), (115215, '2011-08-20 14:45:00.0', 'Statistical Power Analysis', '

'), (115216, '2011-09-25 09:00:00.0', 'Regression Analysis Basics', '

'), (115217, '2011-10-30 11:15:00.0', 'Ethics in Data Science', '

'), (115218, '2011-11-05 13:00:00.0', 'Bayesian vs Frequentist Statistics', '

What are the main differences between Bayesian and frequentist statistics?
